name: VLA Training Efficiency Research
research_question: What are the training efficiency challenges in Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for robotics (2023-2025), including: 1) Data efficiency problems (large datasets required), 2) Multi-modal training computational costs, 3) Sim-to-real transfer efficiency, 4) Few-shot learning approaches, and 5) Training infrastructure requirements? Focus on papers with specific quantitative metrics: training costs, dataset sizes, compute requirements (GPU hours, FLOPs), and efficiency improvement methods.
